description: Style Note Lightweight and soft, inner wear from chromozome epitomises comfort Fit and takes care of individual requirements with a lot of variety. Ensuring that you are relaxed inside and look good outside, these are stylish necessities that you shouldn't do without. Product Details Black and grey striped brief, has a soft elasticated black waistband, branding on the waistband on the outside, tagless comfort and double layered pouch for comfort and best fit Material and Care 100% cotton Machine wash warm Do not iron on print Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 6' and waist 32") is wearing a size M The final product delivered might vary in colour and prints from the display here.
